backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no tracked features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend file, serving as a human-readable index of the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining light and dark OKLCH CSS variable tokens for a shadcn-style design system including colors, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Inter and Oswald fonts from Google Fonts and jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN, then mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a sticky header with company branding, a hero banner with feature icons, the ReportForm, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Main daily field report form component with localStorage persistence, signature canvas, additional technician entries, and PDF generation via generatePDF utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module confirming no backend queries are needed since the app operates fully client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with a dark industrial OKLCH color system, custom button component classes (primary, secondary, danger, yellow), and a signature canvas utility style.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Defines a `generatePDF` utility that uses jsPDF (loaded via CDN) to produce a formatted letter-sized Daily Field Report PDF for Security Engineering Inc., including project info, personnel, work details, and signature sections.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Oswald, JetBrains Mono), border radii, glow box shadows, and animations, plus the animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3 with a single pending feature request (AR-1) to deploy the current build (Version 28) with the compacted punch in/out layout to production.
